case_title: MONTGOMERY ASSOCIATES,L.P. VS. THOMAS F. WHITE & COMPANY,INC.

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MONTGOMERY ASSOCIATES,L.P. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THOMAS F.
